name: Easy Assembly Hard Sided Bins Black - Brightroom™: Universal Utility Storage, 50% Recycled Plastic, 3622 Volume Capacity
description:
Whether it's time for a picnic, weekend trip or any other outdoor fun, carry the essentials in the Easy-Assembly Hard-Sided Bin with Black Bellyband from Brightroom™. Designed in a rectangle shape with an open top, this black bin offers ample space for your snacks, sports essentials and more. This open-top bin is made with hard plastic, and it can be collapsed when not in use for space-saving storage.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
